summary: Citation panel and inline markers ship as core UI features.

entries.title: Citation Panel
entries.description: A slide-out panel shows the topic snippet, document title, and live URL for each source referenced in the response.

entries.title: Inline Citation Markers
entries.description: Source references appear as clickable [1] [2] [3] markers embedded at the exact sentence drawing from each source.

entries.title: Faster source ranking
entries.description: Source retrieval latency reduced by 30% through improved vector index sharding.

entries.title: Citation panel closes on outside click
entries.description: The citation panel now dismisses correctly when the user clicks anywhere outside it.

entries.title: Multi-document comparison view
entries.description: Side-by-side comparison of up to three source documents is planned for the next release.

entries.title: Deep links require reload on first visit
entries.description: Navigating directly to a citation URL on first page load may require a manual refresh to resolve correctly.

entries.title: Vector store migration to pgvector
entries.description: Replaced the in-memory FAISS index with a persistent pgvector store backed by Cloud SQL.

entries.title: Cloud Run min-instances set to 1
entries.description: Cold-start latency eliminated by keeping one instance warm at all times.
